'''âv-h-l-s''' ('''kavahlesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaup|yaup]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaup|yaup]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-h-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kavahlesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivahlesoko|thivahlesoko]] || [[word:jivahlesoko|jivahlesoko]] || [[word:shivahlesoko|shivahlesoko]] || [[word:kivahlesoko|kivahlesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
